question: What are the ids, names and popularity of the participants, order by the number of songs they perform?
sql: SELECT participants.id, participants.name, participants.popularity FROM participants JOIN performance_score ON participants.id = performance_score.participant_id GROUP BY participants.id ORDER BY COUNT(performance_score.songs_id) DESC;

back_translation.intent: 查询参与者及其表演评分信息

semantic.reason: 原始问题要求按参与者表演的歌曲数量排序，但SQL反向翻译的order_by字段是按performance_score.songs_id排序，未明确关联参与者与歌曲数量的逻辑，导致语义不一致。
